name: com.saesentsessis.unity-data-shards
description: Performance-first save-system abstraction: GUID-identified data shards flowing through a zero-copy arena pipeline into pluggable serializers, layouts, and storage backends. Incremental saves, xxHash3-checksummed envelopes, blob-level schema migrations.

samples.description: ISerializer backed by System.Text.Json with a zero-alloc SerializableGuid converter. Requires the System.Text.Json DLL.
ISerializer backed by MessagePack-CSharp with a raw 16-byte SerializableGuid formatter. Requires MessagePack + mpc for IL2CPP.
ISerializer backed by Cysharp MemoryPack (buffer-native, fastest). Requires MemoryPack; shards must be [MemoryPackable] partial.
ISerializer backed by protobuf-net with auto member mapping and a fixed64 SerializableGuid surrogate. Requires protobuf-net.
